URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/rapid-tests/ 
Rapid Tests 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What are rapid tests? 
Rapid tests, also known as rapid diagnostic tests or RDTs, are easy-to-use tests that provide quick results, usually in 20 minutes or less. Most standard tests have to be sent to a lab, and you have to wait for the results. With a rapid test, you can have the test done and get the results at your provider's office or a clinic.
